pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 50 creates calendar.event with name='Project Alpha Sync'; task.json description line 5 references this name; verifier.py line 44 searches for 'Project Alpha Sync'
task.json description line 5 states 'ACCEPT it' for Project Alpha Sync; verifier.py line 49 verifies status == 'accepted' for this event
setup_task.sh line 63 creates calendar.event with name='Vendor Cold Call'; task.json description line 5 references this name; verifier.py line 60 searches for 'Vendor Cold Call'
task.json description line 5 states 'DECLINE it' for Vendor Cold Call; verifier.py line 65 verifies status == 'declined' for this event

privileged_info_summary: The task creates two synthetic calendar events in Odoo: 'Project Alpha Sync' scheduled for 10:00 AM next Wednesday (requiring acceptance) and 'Vendor Cold Call' scheduled for 11:00 AM next Wednesday (requiring decline). The verifier checks that Project Alpha Sync receives 'accepted' status and Vendor Cold Call receives 'declined' status, awarding 40 points each for correct responses plus 20 points if both events exist in the database.
